name: Fight Arena

notes.en: Keyboard-first: this is a local 2-player pass-and-play fighter, so the two players SPLIT one keyboard. Player 1 (left side): A/D move, W jump, S crouch, F light punch, G heavy punch, V light kick, B heavy kick, R special. Player 2 (right side): Arrow keys move/jump/crouch, K light punch, L heavy punch, , light kick, . heavy kick, ; special. Hold AWAY from your opponent to block; double-tap left/right to dash. The two schemes are independent and never interfere. In Vs Computer (solo) mode a simple on-screen d-pad + attack buttons appear on touch devices as a fallback; keyboard remains primary.
notes.ru: Приоритет — клавиатура: это файтинг на двоих за одним устройством, поэтому игроки ДЕЛЯТ одну клавиатуру. Игрок 1 (слева): A/D — движение, W — прыжок, S — присесть, F — лёгкий удар рукой, G — тяжёлый рукой, V — лёгкий ногой, B — тяжёлый ногой, R — спецприём. Игрок 2 (справа): стрелки — движение/прыжок/присед, K — лёгкий рукой, L — тяжёлый рукой, , — лёгкий ногой, . — тяжёлый ногой, ; — спецприём. Держи направление ОТ соперника, чтобы блокировать; двойное нажатие влево/вправо — рывок. Схемы независимы и не мешают друг другу. В режиме против компьютера на сенсорных экранах появляется экранный крестовина + кнопки ударов как запасной вариант; клавиатура остаётся основной.

notes: Original 1v1 side-view versus fighting game (own characters/moves/art — Street Fighter is only a genre reference, nothing copied). combat.js is a pure, DOM-free, fixed-60Hz simulation directly steppable from window.OGH_FIGHT_ARENA: a per-fighter state machine (idle/walk/jump/crouch/block/attack/hitstun/ko), real STARTUP->ACTIVE->RECOVERY attack windows, and hit detection by genuine axis-aligned hitbox-vs-hurtbox rectangle OVERLAP (not center distance) — crouching literally shortens the hurtbox so 'high' attacks whiff over it. Three deliberately-different characters: Volt (balanced, Arc Bolt PROJECTILE that travels the stage as its own entity), Boulder (slow/high-HP/high-damage, Rising Ram UPPERCUT gap-closer/anti-air), Sable (fast/fragile, Slip Strike forward RUSH). Blocking (hold away) negates most damage to chip; a simple combo system lets cancelable light normals chain on hit; universal double-tap dash. Best-of-3 rounds with a round timer, KO/time-out round-end, round-transition banner and a match-winner screen. Modes: local 2-player on one split keyboard (primary) and vs-AI (ai.js) for solo. No bundled image or audio assets: fighters/stage/HUD are all Canvas 2D neon-vector shapes, and sound reuses games/_shared/js/ogh-sfx.js unchanged (thwack=hit, clack=block, whoosh/tap=swing, screech=bolt, die=KO, pickup=Fight!, win=match). Keyboard is the deliberate primary (a correct exception to the hub's touch-first norm for a shared-keyboard local fighter); on-screen touch controls are a solo vs-AI fallback only. RTL (Arabic) flips text/menu chrome only — the fight stage, P1/P2 sides and movement directions never mirror.
